title: Same procedure as every Tuesday, Miss Sophie
author: Bemme, Jens
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The ‘DatenlaubeJam’ is a digital weekly project team meeting since 2020. Every Tuesday morning at 8:15 a.m. we talk and coach with active members and friends of the Dresden Historical Society about transcriptions (wikisource) , open metadata of the publications of the Historical Society from 2022 (wikidata) and other open topics (e.g. open educational resources on wikiversity). 
 Topic contributors and editors are Citizen Scientists of the wiki communities. Our poster will show representative examples and illustrate the role allocation in the cooperative transcription and annotation work.
